raw_transcript: That's the problem, Doctor. I feel like I'm doing everything right, but I'm still so bloated. I have diarrhea almost every morning, and my energy levels are zero. I'm exhausted all the time.
final_corrected_note: That's the problem, Doctor. I feel like I'm doing everything right, but I'm still so bloated. I have diarrhea almost every morning, and my energy levels are zero. I'm exhausted all the time.
